summary: End-to-end testing of UniAI multi-tenant University AI SaaS. Verified JWT auth, Super Admin dashboard (overview stats, 8 seeded Telangana universities + ability to add new, AI/status toggles), Tenant Admin dashboard (Kakatiya University scope, 6 data tabs), and role-based isolation. 23/23 backend pytest tests passed; all critical frontend flows passed via Playwright.

issues: Stat numbers and sub-labels render without separator in plain-text extraction (e.g. 'Universities 9 9 active'); visually correct in screenshot — no action needed unless screen-reader output matters
Tenant Admin entry displays 'Kakatiya University / Admin@123' instead of the actual email — descriptive only; the demo-tenant quick-fill button works correctly

critical_code_review_comments: CORS middleware is added AFTER include_router in server.py — middleware ordering in FastAPI/Starlette still applies it (Starlette wraps middleware lazily), but for clarity it is conventional to add CORSMiddleware before include_router. Not currently breaking.
All endpoints respond 200 with proper status codes; role guards (403) and missing-token (401) work correctly. JWT uses HS256 with secret from env — good.
Backend uses SQLite file (sqlite:////app/backend/uniai_dev.db) as documented. Persistent across restarts in this sandbox.

data-testid coverage is excellent on all interactive elements (login form, demo buttons, ai-toggle-<TENANT_ID>, status-toggle-<TENANT_ID>, add-university-btn, modal fields uni-<key>, tab-<key>, logout-button, page-title).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login, super dashboard, ai toggle, status toggle, add university, tenant dashboard, 6 tabs, logout, ProtectedRoute)

test_credentials: Super: superadmin@uniai.app / SuperAdmin@123. Tenant: aishwarya.mudirajadm4@ku.ac.in / Admin@123 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md).
seed_data_creation: Created two test universities via Super Admin POST and UI: TEST_TEST05AACA (from a prior run, already in DB) and UITEST<ts> (this run). These persist in SQLite — acceptable per problem statement. No production data modified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers auth (login/me/invalid), super admin (overview/list/ai/status/create/duplicate), tenant admin (overview + 6 list endpoints parametrized), and role isolation (tenant->super 403, super->tenant 403, no-token 401). Run with: cd /app/backend && pytest tests/backend_test.py -v. The seed DB contains 8 Telangana universities, 1043 students, 133 professors, 36 admins. Frontend BACKEND URL: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Token stored in localStorage as 'uniai_token'. Logout selector is data-testid='logout-button' (NOT logout-btn).
rca_of_the_issue: No issues found — all features in the review_request worked as specified.
